properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've a message from the Lord, hallelujah! This message unto you I'll give, 'Tis recorded in His word, hallelujah! It is only that you "look and live."

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: "Look and live," my brother, live, Look to Jesus now, and live; 'Tis recorded in His word, hallelujah! It is only that you "look and live."

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I've a message full of love, hallelujah! A message, O my friend, for you, 'Tis a message from above, hallelujah! Jesus said it, and I know'tis true.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Life is offered unto you, hallelujah! Eternal life thy soul shall have, If you'll only look to Him, hallelujah! Look to Jesus who alone can save.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I will tell you how I came, hallelujah! To Jesus when He made me whole- 'Twas believing on His name, hallelujah! I trusted and He saved my soul.
